series_metadata.series_description: Form SF-230 Supplement is provided for Public School Officials who sent an overpayment to the Treasurer, State of Ohio and desire a refund of money not to exceed the amount of insufficiency from the Bureau of Unemployment Services as provided in Section 4141.47 ORC and certification by the Department of Education as required in such section.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain five years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain five years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
